params.name: Prime Meridian
params.description:
On Feb 8, 1884 AD, the International Meridian Conference determined the location of the prime meridian.
Due to the nature of meridians, they do not have a natural origin like the equator of a latitude line. Therefore, in the early days, different countries used different prime meridians, which caused many inconveniences for navigation and land surveys. In order to coordinate time measurement and determine geographical longitude, the International Meridian Conference determined that the meridi …
